task_params.title: Practical Electronics Handbook Chapter Ideas
chapter_points: Start with measurement habits before circuit theory
Explain failure modes and troubleshooting mindset
Power supplies, grounding, and noise deserve early chapters
Include lab safety and mains-voltage cautions
Bridge hobby prototypes to reliable field-ready designs
Add test equipment chapter for scopes, meters, and signal sources
